title: Studio Calico Park Avenue Kit Layouts
excerpt: Happy Thanksgiving! I'm thankful for a lot of things, but wanted to mention how thankful I am that YOU are coming to read my blog. I truly appreciate it! Every month I feel like I don't have quite enough time…
body:
Happy Thanksgiving! I'm thankful for a lot of things, but wanted to mention how thankful I am that YOU are coming to read my blog. I truly appreciate it! Every month I feel like I don't have quite enough time to use my SC kits, but this time, I carved out a few days and was able to get caught up on several occasions I wanted to document. Love the Studio Calico Park Ave kits and the mix of colors and patterns. I incorporated various techniques like stamping, sewing and painting with watercolors. If you're looking to get only 1 or 2 add-ons, I would highly recommend Helmsley and Ritz. Here's how my projects came together.

For Project Life spreads, I really wanted to utilize the pocket pages for the opening party for Hello Kitty Con. I ended up taking quite a few photos that will likely just go into a mini, but I did want to tell this story in my regular album as well. I used the good vibes only card (even though I really wanted to hoard it) from Grand Central. The stamps from Lenox Hill look very Hello Kitty-ish. And of course I love the look of the Kal script wood alpha too.

Using the Project Life main kit only I created a spread covering 3 full days of fun.
